✦ COMPLETE AI ROADMAP 2025

Your AI Learning
Journey

// from EDA → Full Stack AI Engineer

YOU ARE HERE → Phase 2: EDA & Statistics
Overall Progress~20% complete
01
Mathematics & Programming Foundations
// Pre-requisites · 4–6 weeks
FOUNDATION
📐
Linear Algebra
Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, SVD — the backbone of ML models
📊
Calculus
Derivatives, gradients, chain rule — essential for backpropagation
🎲
Probability & Statistics
Distributions, Bayes theorem, hypothesis testing
🐍
Python for AI
NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib — data manipulation & visualization
PythonNumPyPandasMatplotlibJupyter
02
EDA — Exploratory Data Analysis
// Data Understanding · 3–4 weeks
YOU ARE HERE
📍 You are currently here! Master this phase before moving forward.
🔍
Data Collection & Cleaning
Handling nulls, duplicates, outliers, data types
📈
Univariate Analysis
Distributions, histograms, box plots, skewness
🔗
Bivariate & Multivariate
Correlation, scatter plots, heatmaps, pair plots
🧹
Feature Engineering
Encoding, scaling, transformation, new feature creation
📉
Dimensionality Reduction
PCA, t-SNE, UMAP for visualization & compression
📊
Data Visualization
Seaborn, Plotly, storytelling with data
PandasSeabornPlotlyMissingnoScipy
03
Classical Machine Learning
// Supervised & Unsupervised · 6–8 weeks
MACHINE LEARNING
📏
Linear & Logistic Regression
Prediction, classification, gradient descent
🌳
Decision Trees & Random Forest
Ensemble methods, bagging, boosting
⚡
SVM & KNN
Support vectors, hyperplanes, k-nearest neighbors
🚀
XGBoost / LightGBM
Gradient boosting — Kaggle winning algorithms
🔵
Clustering (K-Means, DBSCAN)
Unsupervised grouping, anomaly detection
🧪
Model Evaluation
Cross-validation, confusion matrix, ROC-AUC, F1
Scikit-learnXGBoostLightGBMCatBoost
04
Deep Learning & Neural Networks
// Neural Architectures · 8–10 weeks
DEEP LEARNING
🧠
ANN — Artificial Neural Networks
Perceptrons, activation functions, backpropagation
🖼️
CNN — Computer Vision
Convolutions, pooling, image classification, object detection
🔄
RNN / LSTM / GRU
Sequence modeling, time series, vanishing gradient
⚙️
Optimizers & Regularization
Adam, dropout, batch normalization, learning rate scheduling
🏗️
Transfer Learning
Fine-tuning ResNet, VGG, EfficientNet on custom data
🎨
GANs — Generative Models
Generator vs Discriminator, image synthesis
TensorFlowPyTorchKerasOpenCVCUDA
05
NLP & Large Language Models
// Language AI · 6–8 weeks
ADVANCED AI
📝
Text Preprocessing
Tokenization, stemming, lemmatization, TF-IDF, BOW
🔢
Word Embeddings
Word2Vec, GloVe, FastText, semantic similarity
🤖
Transformer Architecture
Self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encoding
🦾
BERT & GPT Models
Pre-training, fine-tuning, prompt engineering
🔗
RAG — Retrieval Augmented
Vector databases, embeddings, LLM + knowledge base
🎯
Fine-tuning LLMs
LoRA, QLoRA, instruction tuning, RLHF
HuggingFaceLangChainNLTKSpaCyPineconeOpenAI API
06
Reinforcement Learning & Advanced Topics
// RL, AutoML, Ethics · 6–8 weeks
ADVANCED AI
🎮
RL Fundamentals
Agents, rewards, policies, Q-learning, Markov Decision Process
🕹️
Deep RL (DQN, PPO)
Deep Q-Networks, policy gradient, Actor-Critic
🔬
AutoML & Hyperparameter Tuning
Optuna, Bayesian optimization, neural architecture search
🌊
Diffusion Models
Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, image generation fundamentals
⚖️
AI Ethics & Safety
Bias, fairness, explainability (SHAP, LIME), responsible AI
🔭
Multimodal AI
Vision-language models, CLIP, GPT-4V, audio + text
OpenAI GymStable-Baselines3OptunaSHAP
07
MLOps & AI Deployment
// Production AI · 4–6 weeks
PRODUCTION
🐳
Docker & Kubernetes
Containerize models, orchestrate deployments at scale
☁️
Cloud AI (AWS/GCP/Azure)
SageMaker, Vertex AI, managed ML services
🔁
CI/CD for ML Pipelines
MLflow, DVC, model versioning, experiment tracking
🌐
Model Serving APIs
FastAPI, Flask, REST endpoints, latency optimization
📡
Model Monitoring
Data drift, model drift, logging, alerts in production
🏆
AI System Design
End-to-end AI product design, scalable architecture
MLflowFastAPIDockerAWS SageMakerDVCWeights & Biases
